name: sysinternals
description: Install Sysinternals Suite tools for system diagnostics and monitoring.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${sysintPath}='C:\Program Files\Sysinternals'; ${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\sysinternals-verify.log'; if (Test-Path ${sysintPath}) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value 'Sysinternals installed successfully'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\sysinternals-smoke.txt') -Value 'sysinternals_ok' } else { 'Sysinternals directory not found at ' + ${sysintPath} | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
